* Well hello~

  have met before.

obj_primflower_Draw_73_6:
* My name is Primflower, but my
  friends call me Prim@
* Pleased to make your acquaintance~
obj_primflower_Draw_73_7: As you may have gathered already, I am not from around here.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_8:
* A while ago, I decided to go
  on a journey of self-discovery.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_9: Meeting people here and there, and even teaching some of them~

obj_primflower_Draw_73_11: Is that not so sad? haha~
obj_primflower_Draw_73_12: Nowadays, I just relax in this place, selling whatever I can sell...
obj_primflower_Draw_73_13: And talking to whoever I can talk to~
obj_primflower_Draw_73_14: You sure seem interested in little old me...
obj_primflower_Draw_73_15: How about I invite you to a cup of tea before we talk any further?
obj_primflower_Draw_73_18: You need not ask me the reason for my journey.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_19: You will understand the need to find yourself sooner than you think~
obj_primflower_Draw_73_21: You see, the story of this world is neck deep in conflict~
obj_primflower_Draw_73_22: Imagine being watched all the time by a whole family...
obj_primflower_Draw_73_23: Only for said family to be torn apart.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_24: The TV- The Cathode was by all means abandoned.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_25: That was what led Loomi Neus to such desperation.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_30: Haha, you are right, how silly of me~
obj_primflower_Draw_73_31: Ah, The Roaring Knight in Golden Armor...
obj_primflower_Draw_73_32: It is very interesting, is it not?
obj_primflower_Draw_73_33: The power of will, the power to stand unfazed in front of the insurmountable.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_35: You have so many questions about them~
obj_primflower_Draw_73_36: But do not worry... You both are fated to clash.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_37: I hope that, by then, you are... Determined enough, to confront impending destiny~
obj_primflower_Draw_73_38: As you can see, I enjoy freedom@ I do as I please~
obj_primflower_Draw_73_41: That is not what you mean, do you?
obj_primflower_Draw_73_42: Knowledge is dangerous, Kris@ It can bring someone to insanity with ease.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_43: And this insanity... is born from obsession.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_44: To be something more, to achieve a goal they didn't know existed before...
obj_primflower_Draw_73_45: These hopes and dreams... they can take physical form.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_47: One of the rarest materials across the Dark Dimension, precious to both Lightners and Darkners...
obj_primflower_Draw_73_48: However... obsession can also give someone an intense drive.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_49: It could even turn an inoffensive person into a formidable foe, you know?~
obj_primflower_Draw_73_50: You will find out more... in due time.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_51: That stuffed cat is still blind? Haha~
obj_primflower_Draw_73_52: It is difficult not to see these crystals, with the darkness they ooze.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_53: Then again, only purification was that cat's forte~
obj_primflower_Draw_73_54: But do not worry. Artisanship is my specialty~
obj_primflower_Draw_73_55: I will help you make a new Shadow Mantle.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_56: Do keep your eyes on it, lest you lose it again~
obj_primflower_Draw_73_57: Think of it as a favor, considering I am going to stay in your town from now on~
obj_primflower_Draw_73_60: Whenever you need to make something with these crystals, come find me.
obj_primflower_Draw_73_62: What would you like to buy?
obj_primflower_Draw_73_63: Take care... we will see each other very, very soon~

obj_ch3_epilogue_text_Draw_73_132: Yeah{ We should do this again.

obj_ch3_epilogue_text_Draw_73_145: ... I don't even remember how I got here, or who came before me.
obj_ch3_epilogue_text_Draw_73_146: I didn't know the first thing about having friends... until now.
obj_ch3_epilogue_text_Draw_73_147: We've done so much, met so many people...

obj_ch3_epilogue_text_Draw_73_149: It means so much to me... so I...
obj_ch3_epilogue_text_Draw_73_150: I want to protect that, Kris... to do whatever I can for the best outcome.
obj_ch3_epilogue_text_Draw_73_153: What if there was a way... to prepare for what comes next?

obj_ch3_epilogue_text_Draw_73_155: Is that silly of me to think} Would such a thing even be possible?
obj_ch3_epilogue_text_Draw_73_156: If you'd like to try too, Kris, then...

obj_ch3_epilogue_text_Draw_73_158: ...and think about what the Knight is doing?
